name: uai-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for UAI (Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence) submissions: venue fit, OpenReview submission audits, author response, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, supplementary packaging, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and cycle workflow. Grounded in official AUAI / UAI 2026 pages, the UAI OpenReview group, and PMLR proceedings volumes checked on 2026-07-08.
